title: diphasiastrum novoguineense
intro: Diphasiastrum novoguineense, also known as the New Guinea forked poly-pody, is a species of vascular plant in the genus Diphasiastrum, which belongs to the family Lycopodiaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects, as well as its ability to aid in the treatment of respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. The health benefits of Diphasiastrum novoguineense include its potential to reduce fever, relieve coughs, and alleviate symptoms of pneumonia, making it a valuable natural remedy for various respiratory conditions. In traditional herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and stems are typically dried and made into infusions or decoctions, which are then used to treat a range of health issues.
